LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.desc: Paint a T-51 power armor with Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.labe: paint T-51 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.desc: Paint a T-60 power armor with Appalachia Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.labe: paint T-60 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.descripti: Paint a T-45 power armor with Lyons Pride Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.label: paint T-45 power armor (Lyons Pride)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.descrip: Paint a T-45 power armor with Outcast Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.label: paint T-45 power armor (Outcast)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.description: Paint a T-51 power armor with standard Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.label: paint T-51 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.description: Paint a T-60 power armor with standard Brotherhood Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.label: paint T-60 power armor Appalachia chapter
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor_Helm: Paint a T51 power armor helmet in Brotherhood Appalachia chapter colors.
Painting T51 helmet in Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor_Helm: Paint a T60 power armor helmet in Brotherhood Appalachia chapter colors.
Painting T60 helmet in Appalachia colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: Paint a T45 power armor helmet in Lyons Pride Remnants colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.jo: Painting T45 helmet in Lyons Pride colors.
Paint a T45 power armor helmet in Brotherhood Outcast colors.
Painting T45 helmet in Outcast colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Paint a T51 power armor helmet in standard Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: Painting T51 helmet in BoS colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: paint T51 helmet (BoS standard)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Paint a T60 power armor helmet in standard Brotherhood of Steel colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: Painting T60 helmet in BoS colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: paint T60 helmet (BoS standard)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_BoS_Classic_Combat_Armo: Upgrade reinforced combat armor with Brotherhood of Steel technology and specialized components.
LanguageData.FCP_Extract_Blood.description: Extract blood from a living person to create blood packs for transfusions. The donor will experience temporary blood loss and weakness.
LanguageData.FCP_Extract_Blood.label: extract blood
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_Enclave_Advanced_Power_A: Craft a suit of Enclave Advanced Power Armor using military-grade schematics.
Craft a suit of Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII using military-grade schematics.
Making Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII.
make Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII
Craft an Enclave Advanced Power Armor Helmet using military-grade schematics.
Making Enclave Advanced Power Armor Helmet.
make Enclave Advanced Power Armor Helmet
Craft an Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet using military-grade schematics.
Making Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet.
make Enclave Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armo: Convert a T-45 power armor suit into NCR salvaged power armor by stripping out the servomotors and replacing advanced systems with simpler, more maintainable components.
Converting T-45 armor to NCR salvaged power armor.
convert T-45 armor to NCR salvaged power armor
Convert a T-45 power armor helmet into an NCR salvaged power armor helmet by stripping out advanced components and adding NCR modifications.
Converting T-45 helmet to NCR salvaged power armor helmet.
convert T-45 helmet to NCR salvaged power armor helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Create_Nuka_Ice_Cold.description: Place a bottle of Nuka-Cola Classic into a refreidgerator and turn it into the Ice Cold variant.
LanguageData.FCP_Create_Nuka_Ice_Cold.label: make nuka-cola (ice cold)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor_: Paint a T-51 power armor helmet with Abraxo Cleaner branding.
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Flames_Power: Paint a T-51 power armor helmet with dazzling flame decals.
paint T-51 power armor helmet (Hotrodder Flame Job)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Pink_Power_A: Paint a T-51 power armor helmet in bold, vibrant hot pink.
paint T-51 power armor helmet (Hotrodder Hotpink)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Shark_Paint_Power_A: Paint a T-51 power armor helmet with menacing shark teeth.
paint T-51 power armor helmet (Hotrodder Shark Paint)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Sugar_Bombs_Power_A: Paint a T-51 power armor helmet with Sugar Bombs branding.
paint T-51 power armor helmet (Sugar Bombs)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Flames_Power: Paint a T-60 power armor helmet with dazzling flame decals.
paint T-60 power armor helmet (Hotrodder Flame Job)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Pink_Power_A: Paint a T-60 power armor helmet in bold, vibrant hot pink.
paint T-60 power armor helmet (Hotrodder Hotpink)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T60_Shark_Paint_Power_A: Paint a T-60 power armor helmet with menacing shark teeth.
paint T-60 power armor helmet (Hotrodder Shark Paint)
Paint a T-51 power armor with Abraxo Cleaner branding.
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Flames_Power: Paint a T-51 power armor with dazzling flame decals.
paint T-51 power armor (Hotrodder Flame Job)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Pink_Power_A: Paint a T-51 power armor in bold, vibrant hot pink.
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Shark_Paint_Power_A: Paint a T-51 power armor with menacing shark teeth.
paint T-51 power armor (Hotrodder Shark Paint)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Sugar_Bombs_Power_A: Paint a T-51 power armor with Sugar Bombs branding.
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Flames_Power: Paint a T-60 power armor with dazzling flame decals.
paint T-60 power armor (Hotrodder Flame Job)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T60_Hotrod_Pink_Power_A: Paint a T-60 power armor in bold, vibrant hot pink.
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T60_Shark_Paint_Power_A: Paint a T-60 power armor with menacing shark teeth.
paint T-60 power armor (Hotrodder Shark Paint)
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_Secret_Service_Armor: Craft Secret Service Armor using classified schematics. Requires positive relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_Secret_Service_Helme: Craft a Secret Service Helmet using classified schematics. Requires positive relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_Secret_Service_Under: Craft Secret Service Underarmor using classified schematics. Requires positive relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor.desc: Craft a suit of T-65 Secret Service Power Armor using top-secret military schematics. The pinnacle of American power armor technology. Requires excellent relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor.jobS: Making T-65 Secret Service Power Armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor.labe: make T-65 Secret Service Power Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor_Helm: Craft a T-65 Secret Service Power Armor Helmet using top-secret military schematics. The most advanced power armor helmet ever created. Requires excellent relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Paint_USA_Army_T51_Power_Armo: Paint a T-51 power armor in official United States Army colors and insignia. Requires military clearance.
Paint a T-51 power armor helmet in official United States Army colors and insignia. Requires military clearance.
paint T-51 power armor helmet (US Army)
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Paint_USA_Army_T60_Power_Armo: Paint a T-60 power armor in official United States Army colors and insignia. The most advanced military power armor paint scheme available. Requires excellent military clearance.
Paint a T-60 power armor helmet in official United States Army colors and insignia. The most advanced military power armor helmet paint scheme available. Requires excellent military clearance.
paint T-60 power armor helmet (US Army)
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Black_Blood_Sausage.description: Cook black blood sausage from wasteland meat and blood.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Black_Blood_Sausage.label: cook black blood sausage
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.description: Cook a hearty brahmin pot pie with prime beast meat, tatos, and razorgrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.label: cook brahmin pot pie
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Bug_Mush.description: Grind insects into a protein-rich mush.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Bug_Mush.label: cook bug mush
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.description: Cook a simple chicken noodle cup with poultry and razorgrain noodles.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.label: cook chicken noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.descripti: Cook a spicy, aggressive stew with whatever meat is available and plenty of jalapeños.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.label: cook cook-cook's fiend stew
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Crispy_Wings.description: Deep-fry rad chicken wings until crispy and golden.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Crispy_Wings.label: cook crispy wings
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.descri: Prepare a premium meal of deathclaw steak with fresh eggs.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.label: cook deathclaw steak and eggs
Prepare deathclaw steak served with razorgrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Flea_Soup.description: Boil a thin broth from small creatures and scraps.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Flea_Soup.label: cook flea soup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Meat_On_A_Stick.description: Grill simple meat skewers over an open flame.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Meat_On_A_Stick.label: cook meat on a stick
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Noodle_Cup.description: Prepare a basic cup of razorgrain noodles.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Noodle_Cup.label: cook noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak.description: Prepare a well-cooked steak from prime wasteland beast meat.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak.label: cook prime meat steak
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak_With_Corn_And_: Prepare a lavish meal of prime steak with grilled maize and roasted tatos.
Cooking prime steak with corn and tatos.
cook prime meat steak with corn and tatos
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sausages.description: Grill simple sausages from ground wasteland meat.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sausages.label: cook sausages
